prompt: Create an epic dark fantasy scene inspired by The Legend of Zelda: one lone elven warrior hero, Link, stands in silhouette on a rooftop at the center foreground, viewed from behind in a powerful wide-legged stance. The hero wears a pointed cap and adventurer armor, with exactly 1 sword held at the side and exactly 1 shield strapped to the back. Above him hangs exactly 1 gigantic terrifying mechanical moon face, filling most of the sky, descending over the city like an apocalyptic mask; it has exactly 2 blazing orange circular eyes, a small sharp nose, and a huge grimacing mouth made of ornate bronze-and-black machinery, gears, filigree, craters, pipes, and engraved steampunk details. Below, create a sprawling medieval fantasy festival city at night with crooked towers, gothic rooftops, clock towers, balconies, banners, strings of warm lanterns, glowing windows, fireworks, sparks, and orange firelight flooding the streets. Use a dramatic low-angle ultra-wide composition, with the hero centered beneath the moon for scale and symmetry, the city curving around him in deep perspective. Color palette: deep midnight blue sky, black shadows, molten orange and gold illumination, glowing amber highlights, high contrast, cinematic volumetric haze. Style: highly detailed dark fantasy concept art, ornate steampunk architecture, hyper-detailed texture, sharp focus, dramatic lighting, Lightroom-style color grading, upscaled clarity, 16:9 widescreen. Mood: ominous, majestic, apocalyptic, heroic. No text, no watermark, no modern objects.
